is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of pre-treatment P. falciparum isolates: pfcrt K76T, dhfr and dhps genotyping.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfcrt 76, Pfdhfr 51/59/108, Pfdhps 436/437/540 — all curated codons.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 1 gives n and n(%) per codon; Table 2 gives counts per city for pfcrt and dhfr/dhps categories.

sub_country_location.evidence: Table 2 breaks down frequencies by urban region: Brazzaville and Pointe-Noire, e.g. pfcrt 76T pure mutant 83/96 Brazzaville, 39/42 Pointe-Noire.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Genotyping frequencies pool samples collected 1999 (Pointe-Noire, Jan-Mar 1999), 2001 (Brazzaville Jane Vialle, Mar-Apr 2001), and 2002 (Makelekele, Feb-Apr 2002). Tables 1/2 pool 1999–2002 across >3 years; even per-city Brazzaville pools 2001 and 2002 collections without per-site frequency breakdown.

african_field_samples.evidence: Field/clinical isolates from children under 5 in Brazzaville and Pointe-Noire, Republic of Congo.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical genotyping and drug-use survey study.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Samples derive from patients assigned in a prior in vivo efficacy study (Nsimba et al. 2004), indicating overlap with a previously-published dataset from the same population.

supplement.evidence: No supplementary materials referenced; all frequency data in Tables 1–2.

assessment.summary: Primary study genotyping pfcrt, dhfr and dhps in P. falciparum isolates from children in Brazzaville and Pointe-Noire, Congo (1999–2002). Frequencies are extractable per codon and split by the two cities (Table 2). However, the pooled 1999–2002 frequencies span more than three years and per-city frequencies combine multiple collection periods without a temporal breakdown, failing the temporal-resolution criterion.
exclusion_reasons: Temporal resolution >3 years: genotyping frequencies pool samples collected 1999–2002 without per-year/per-site (<=3y) frequency breakdown; Brazzaville data pool 2001 and 2002 collections.
